hero.title: Gangjeong Peace Music Camp
hero.subtitle: End the War! Let's Sing, Let's Dance
hero.message: A message of peace starting from Gangjeong Village
hero.image_alt: Performance stage of Peace Music Camp at Gangjeong Village beach

footer.description: A music project for peace starting from Gangjeong Village, Jeju. Gangjeong Peace Music Camp is where musicians sing together and stand in solidarity, wishing for peace in conflict zones around the world.
footer.sns_aria: Follow Gangjeong Peace Music Camp on Instagram

default.title: Gangjeong Peace Music Camp 2026 | Jeju Anti-War Music Festival
default.description: A music project for peace starting from Gangjeong Village, Jeju. Anti-war peace music festival held at Gangjeong Sports Park on June 5-7, 2026.

camp.not_found_desc: The requested camp information could not be found.
camp.description_2026: The 3rd Gangjeong Peace Music Camp will be held from June 5 (Fri) to June 7 (Sun), 2026, at Gangjeong Sports Park in Seogwipo, Jeju. Marking the 73rd anniversary of the Korean War armistice, the camp expands for the first time into a 3-day, 2-night format with 50 acts. As militarization and the threat of war intensify on the Korean Peninsula, the song of peace that began in Gangjeong Village grows into a stronger and wider solidarity. Under the slogan "Let's sing, let's dance, end the war!", musicians from diverse genres deliver messages of peace and anti-war through music. Tickets are on sale on the official booking page.
camp.seo_title_2026: 3rd Gangjeong Peace Music Camp 2026 · Jun 5–7 · Jeju · 50 Acts
camp.seo_description_2026: The 3rd Gangjeong Peace and Music Camp — June 5–7, 2026 at Gangjeong Village, Jeju Island. 51 Korean indie acts across three days of peace music at Gangjeong Sports Park. Tickets from ₩30,000 (1-day).
camp.slogan_2026: Let's sing, let's dance, end the war!
camp.seo_musician_suffix: Performing at the 3rd Gangjeong Peace & Music Camp, June 5-7, 2026 at Gangjeong Sports Park, Jeju.
camp.cta_final_body: Help the song of peace that began in Gangjeong reach further. Join us by booking your tickets.
camp.poster_alt_2026: Official poster of the 3rd Gangjeong Peace Music Camp 2026 — June 5–7, Gangjeong Village, Jeju Island, 50 acts
camp.hero_alt: {{year}} Gangjeong Peace Music Camp performance scene
camp.cta_final_image_alt: Gangjeong Peace Music Camp at night — peace candles with the message "End the war"
camp.recap_cta_body: Three days of songs for peace by the Gangjeong sea. Revisit those moments through the photos.
camp.description_2026_past: From June 5–7, 2026, the 3rd Gangjeong Peace and Music Camp took place at Gangjeong Sports Park in Seogwipo, Jeju. Marking the 73rd year of the armistice, the camp expanded for the first time to a three-day format with 50 acts. Under the slogan "Sing, dance, end the war!", three days of anti-war, pro-peace songs rang out by the Gangjeong sea.

camp-2023.title: 1st Gangjeong Peace Music Camp
camp-2023.short_description: The first camp singing for peace in Gangjeong Village
camp-2023.description: The first Peace Music Camp held in Gangjeong Village on June 10, 2023. Under the slogan "End the war! Play, dance, and sing!", we shared solidarity and friendship within the Gangjeong peace movement.
camp-2023.location: Gangjeong Sports Park (669 Ieodo-ro, Seogwipo-si, Jeju)
camp-2023.slogan: End the war! Play, dance, and sing!

camp-2025.title: 2nd Gangjeong Peace Music Camp
camp-2025.short_description: On the 72nd anniversary of the armistice, raise the voices for peace
camp-2025.description: The second Peace Music Camp held across Gangjeong Village, Jeju, on June 14, 2025. Marking the 72nd anniversary of the armistice, it delivered a message of peace against the intensifying militarization of the Korean Peninsula.
camp-2025.location: Gangjeong Sports Park (2661, Gangjeong-dong, Seogwipo-si, Jeju) and around Gangjeong Village
camp-2025.slogan: Let's sing, let's dance, end the war!

camp-2026.title: 3rd Gangjeong Peace Music Camp
camp-2026.description: The 3rd Gangjeong Peace Music Camp will be held from June 5 (Fri) to June 7 (Sun), 2026, at Gangjeong Sports Park in Seogwipo, Jeju. Marking the 73rd anniversary of the Korean War armistice, the camp expands for the first time into a 3-day, 2-night format with 50 acts. As militarization and the threat of war intensify on the Korean Peninsula, the song of peace that began in Gangjeong Village grows into a stronger and wider solidarity. Under the slogan "Let's sing, let's dance, end the war!", musicians from diverse genres deliver messages of peace and anti-war through music. Tickets are on sale on the official booking page.
camp-2026.slogan: Let's sing, let's dance, end the war!

structured_data.project_name: To You in a Distant Place Whose Name I Don't Know
structured_data.description: A project of musicians delivering a message of peace through music in a world where war and violence are prevalent
structured_data.music_group_desc: A musical project singing for peace
structured_data.playlist_desc: Collection of music from the project 'To You in a Distant Place Whose Name I Don't Know'
structured_data.gallery_desc: Photo gallery of the project 'To You in a Distant Place Whose Name I Don't Know'
structured_data.howto_name: How to Attend Gangjeong Peace Music Camp
structured_data.howto_step1_text: Visit peaceandmusic.net to check the camp dates and lineup. The 3rd camp in 2026 runs from June 5 (Fri) to June 7 (Sun).
structured_data.howto_step2_text: Take a bus or taxi from Jeju Airport to Gangjeong Village in Seogwipo. Car rental is also available.
structured_data.howto_step3_text: Book a ticket on the official booking page.
structured_data.howto_step4_text: Arrive at Gangjeong Sports Park and enter with the ticket you purchased.
structured_data.howto_step5_text: Watch performances by musicians of diverse genres and share in the spirit of peace solidarity.

solidarity.page_title: Solidarity Activities | Gangjeong Peace & Music Camp
solidarity.page_desc: Cultural event condemning Israel & for Palestinian liberation 'WE SING FOR YOUR FREEDOM' — Sat. 23 May 2026, 7 PM, Jongno Seoul. Gangjeong Peace & Music Camp stands in solidarity with Palestine.
solidarity.hero_subtitle: With Peace Movements Around the World
solidarity.intro_paragraph: Gangjeong Peace & Music Camp stands in solidarity with peace movements across the globe — from condemning Israel's genocide against Palestine and the liberation movement, to climate justice, to anti-war and anti-nuclear causes. We bring music to wherever peace is demanded.
solidarity.empty_message: Coming soon. Solidarity concert information will be updated shortly.

event_sail.poster_alt: Cultural event condemning Israel for Palestinian liberation poster — WE SING FOR YOUR FREEDOM
event_sail.title: Music and Culture Event Condemning Israel for Palestinian Liberation "WE SING FOR YOUR FREEDOM"
event_sail.venue_address: 26 Jongno, Jongno-gu, Seoul (next block from the Israeli Embassy, Cheonggyecheon side)
event_sail.para_1: The activists Haecho, Seungjun, and Donghyeon, who were illegally abducted by the Israeli occupation forces, have all been released. However, Palestinian people continue to resist the 78-year-long illegal occupation, colonization, and genocide carried out by Israel.
event_sail.para_2: We are therefore transforming the cultural event originally prepared to demand the release of these activists into a cultural event condemning Israel and calling for the liberation of Palestine. We ask for your continued attention and solidarity.
